purpose: Truth matrix for property-classify's deterministic rules: status hierarchy (protected > archived > reviewed > polished > draft), two-layer type classification (content signals over path), conflict handling, casing Nahbereich, and yaml-sanity skip routing. Wired into scripts/test-property-classify.sh.

notes.099_Archive: Status 'archived' uses the same matching semantics as the Layer-2 type rule: any folder-path segment containing 'archive', case-insensitive. The pre-hardening SKILL.md literal '/archive/' (with slashes) missed the vault's own 099_Archive/ convention.
notes.action:conflict: Existing type (not TBD/inbox) differs from proposal: flag, never overwrite. The truth 'type' column shows the value that stays on disk.
notes.action:protected: permanent/evergreen notes are skipped entirely; '-' = untouched.
notes.action:skip-sanity: yaml-sanity verdict routing (additive-only policy): broken keys and duplicate-key collisions are SKIPPED + finding, never repaired by classify, never written through.
notes.path-semantics: Layer-2 'path contains' means the folder path relative to the vault root, EXCLUDING the filename — a note named 'Meeting with Bob.md' in notes/ must not become type meeting via its own filename.
